problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Combining Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
